project.component: { "keyToString": { "C/C++ 文件.TLB.executor": "Run", "C/C++ 文件.transpose.cpp.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.TLB.executor": "Debug", "CMake 应用程序.未命名.executor": "Run", "CMake 调试.TLB.executor": "Debug", "RunOnceActivity.OpenProjectViewOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "WebServerToolWindowFactoryState": "false", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/lenovo/CLionProjects/Multivariate Time Series/0227_MVandDTW_time", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "onboarding.tips.debug.path": "C:/Users/lenovo/CLionProjects/TLB测试/main.cpp", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "CMakeSettings", "structure.view.defaults.are.configured": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
